customAttributes.description: 2, T: Another target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains hexproof until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 7/10/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "They say true heroes always put their teammates before themselves. I often find it's the other way around."
